title: carduus spinosissimus var. elliottii
intro: Carduus spinosissimus var. elliottii, also known as E Elliott's thistle, is a variety of thistle plant that is native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Carduus spinosissimus var. elliottii include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, as well as its potential to support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
